opening_line: Hi - I read a review where Anne mentioned quality workmanship on a job with Heattech Gas Services Ltd. That stood out.
source_quote:
I have had  both Brett and Ryan visit on separate issues with my boiler.
They responded very quickly to my requests for a visit and fitted me in at very short notice .
They were so efficient at diagnosing the problem and dealing with it there and then.
On the most  recent visit Ryan did a great job
why_this_angle: Lead with review detail about quality workmanship (Anne)
suggested_whatsapp: Hi, Julius here. I build websites for local trades. One of your Google reviews from Anne mentioned quality workmanship - I mocked up a one-page site around that. No obligation - want a quick look?

follow_up_replies.text: One-page site from £300. Includes mobile layout and quote form.
No problem - I will remove the preview. Thanks for your time.
